mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, phone, email, avatar, dept_id, status, last_login_ip, last_login_time, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{deptId}, #{status}, #{lastLoginIp}, #{lastLoginTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT role_code FROM sys_role r JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
